---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Docker Dash
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? What's frustrating today?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you tried any workarounds?

## Use Case
Who would benefit from this? (role, scenario)

## Additional Context
Screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
